eng-persist-user-settings.description: Old attempt - PR #36 closed by maintainer

fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-06.description: Fix: persist brightness and colour temperature across restarts

improve-color-temp-hotkeys-2026-06-23.description: Add global hotkeys Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right for colour temperature

eng-ci-pr-check-2026-06-23.description: Add CI build check on push/PR to master

perf-mouse-hook-2026-06-22.description: Reduce GC pressure from WH_MOUSE_LL hook (pre-allocate delegate)

test-appsettings-2026-06-22.description: Add AppSettings unit test project (xUnit, 12 tests)

perf-geometry-dedup-2026-06-25.description: Perf: skip redundant geometry allocation in ApplyHolePunchEffect (1.5px dead-zone) + AppSettings unit tests (xUnit, 11 tests, net10.0)

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.
notes: 2026-06-25: Tasks 8+9. Created single PR perf-geometry-dedup-2026-06-25 covering both: (1) geometry dead-zone in ApplyHolePunchEffect using borderPath.Tag, (2) AppSettings.Load/Save optional path param + 11 xUnit tests. All 11 tests pass. Main build succeeds. AppSettings still only has ExcludeFromCapture on master - none of the persist-brightness PRs merged yet.
